headline: Trump Deploys ICE BADASSES 💪🛂 to SLAY Airport Lines 😩✈️
text:
Travellers SWEATING 😰💦 HOURS-LONG QUEUES 🐌📏 at airports cuz DEMO CRATS 🤡🚫 starving TSA fam NO PAYCHECKS 💸❌ during DHS SHUTDOWN LOCKDOWN 🔒😤! Enter DONALD J TRUMP 🥳🇺🇸, the WALL-BUILDING DADDY 👑🧱, TWITTERING on Truth Social 📱💬: 'MONDAY 🚀 ICE GOONS 🛂🔫 HIT AIRPORTS to BACKUP our HERO TSA AGENTS who STAY GRINDING 💪😤!' Border TSAR TOM HOMAN 🧔‍♂️⚔️ spilling deets on CNN 📰: ICE bros NOT screening peeps 👀🕵️‍♂️ but GUARDING ENTRY/EXIT 🚪🔐 to FREE TSA SIMPS for BAGGAGE PAT-DOWNS 🍑🔍 – lines DROPPING like illegal crossers at the WALL 💥🧱!

TRUMP THREATENED Saturday 🔥: 'If DEMS don't FUND DHS NOW ⏰💰, my BRILLIANT PATRIOTIC ICE WARRIORS 🛡️🇺🇸 will do SECURITY like NO ONE'S SEEN 👻🚀!' Transport Sec SEAN DUFFY 🧑‍💼✈️ hyping on ABC: 'ICE runs SAME MACHINES at SOUTHERN BORDER 🏜️🔍 for PACKAGES & PEEPS – they TRAINED AF 💯!' DHS SPox ROASTING DEMS ☕🔥: 'While LIBS RISK YOUR FLIGHTS 😱✈️, TRUMP DEPLOYING HUNDREDS FUNDED ICE BEASTS 🦍🛂 to CRUSH CHAOS!' Hakeem Jeffries 😭🤡 CRYING on CNN: 'UNTRAINED ICE DUDES in SENSITIVE SPOTS? LAST THING WE NEED 🚫😩!' LOL cry more, border czar owns the skies now 🛫🛂!

TSA UNION AFGE PREZ Everett Kelley 😤📢 SALTY AF: 'Our TSA HEROES SHOW UP NO CHECK 💸 cuz MISSION > MONEY 🛡️❤️, but DON'T REPLACE with ARMED ICE THUGS who DANGEROUS AF 🔫💀!' Facts: 400+ TSA quitters GONE 👋📉 since shutdown, absences SPIKING 📈😷 – all cuz CONGRESS CLOWNS 🤹‍♂️ can't AGREE on DHS BAG 💰🛡️! Dems DEMANDING ICE REFORMS post MINNEAPOLIS SHOOTOUT 💥🔫 where agents POPPED protesters Alex Pretti & Renee Good 😢🪦 – now whining NO MASKS 🚫😷, BETTER IDs 📛, TIGHT WARRANTS 📜🔒. Senate bill FLopped Friday 😭📉!

Trump FIXING DEM-MADE MESS like he OWNS IT 🏆😎 – ICE to AIRPORTS = LINES MELTING 🫠📉, TRAVELERS THRILLED 😍✈️! Dems seething, TSA paid soon? WALL FUNDS or BUST 💥🧱 – MAGA AIR TRAVEL ORGY INCOMING 🚀🍆💨‼️
